title: T-122 — Authorization policies schema and org seed
prompt: Schema/seed only for org_authorization_policies. Former mixed T-122 is split: T-122 schema/seed, T-126 helpers/actions/preflight, T-127 UI. Do not implement UI/actions here. No T-020 dependency cycle.

pipeline_inputs.description: Settings-owned per-org authorization policies for NPD post-release edit requests and Technical approval gates.
pipeline_inputs.details: Schema and seed only for org_authorization_policies.
acceptance_criteria: Schema creates org_authorization_policies with org_id RLS, audit compatibility, allowed policy codes and constraints.
New org seed creates npd_post_release_edit and technical_product_spec_approval rows referencing technical_product_spec_approval_gate_v1.
Migration and seed are idempotent and tests cover constraints, org isolation and defaults.
No helper/action/UI code and no dependency on T-020.
test_strategy: RED unit + RTL tests for policy helpers and screen.
RED tests for schema/seed constraints and helper blocker codes before implementation.
RED RTL tests for read-only vs edit mode and blocker display.
GREEN includes T-020-compatible preflight helpers; do not rely on UI-only validation.
risk_red_lines: No in-place mutation path for released factory spec/BOM.
Do not leave org_authorization_policies as unvalidated JSON-only storage; explicit columns/constraints are required.
Do not make technical_product_spec_approval_gate_v1 optional when technical.product_spec_approval.required=true.
Do not allow policy UI to bypass requires_new_version=true or segregation-of-duties.
